scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.start: cd server && (npx prisma migrate deploy || echo 'WARN: prisma migrate failed (no/invalid DATABASE_URL) — app will run local-only until DB is configured') && NODE_ENV=production node dist/index.js
